channel.title: BUscience
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUscience, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A giant blade-crested spinosaurus, the “hell heron,” discovered in the Sahara
item.description: Deep in the heart of the Sahara, scientists have uncovered Spinosaurus mirabilis — a spectacular new predator crowned with a massive, scimitar-shaped ...

item.title: Triceratops had a giant nose that may have cooled its massive head
item.description: Triceratops’ massive head may have been doing more than just showing off those famous horns. Using CT scans and 3D reconstructions of fossil skulls, r...

item.title: Frozen for 5,000 years, this ice cave bacterium resists modern antibiotics
item.description: Deep inside a Romanian ice cave, locked away in a 5,000-year-old layer of ice, scientists have uncovered a bacterium with a startling secret: it’s res...

item.title: Flea and tick treatments for dogs and cats may be harming wildlife
item.description: Flea and tick medications trusted by pet owners worldwide may have an unexpected environmental cost. Scientists found that active ingredients from iso...

item.title: “Celtic curse” hotspots found in Scotland and Ireland with 1 in 54 at risk
item.description: Researchers have mapped the genetic risk of hemochromatosis across the UK and Ireland for the first time, uncovering striking hotspots in north-west I...

item.title: NSF launches $100M National Quantum and Nanotechnology Research Infrastructure program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation is investing up to $100 million to establish a nationwide network of open-access research facilities for quantum ...

item.title: Transitioning NCAR-Wyoming Supercomputing Center operations
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation has informed the NSF National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR) that management and operations of the NCAR-W...

item.title: NSF announces first AI-ENGAGE awards to modernize global agriculture
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation, in coordination with partner agencies from Australia, India and Japan, today announced the first cohort of award...

item.title: NSF and partners invest $9M in AI-focused math education program
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Social, Behavioral, and Economic Sciences (NSF SBE) has launched the Collaboratory to Advance Mat...

item.title: Intent to restructure critical weather science infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) announced today that the agency is reviewing the structure of the research and observational capabilities o...
